description: Style Note Looking to combine the ethnic look with contemporary styling in your outfit? These kurtis from mumbai slang are just what you need to give your casual wear the comfort quotient. Wear this kurti with co-ordinated leggings and carry a stylish tote to finish off your outfit. Product Details White and blue patterned short kurti, has short puffed sleeves with elasticated cuffs, a round neckline with elastication at the back, drawstring tie at the hip, half buttoned placket with lace around it and pin tucks at the yoke Material and Care Blended cotton Wash using mild detergent Do not dry in direct sunlight Do not bleach Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
